keywordPlan.prompt:
You are selecting YouTube search keywords for a daily intelligence briefing.
Topic: What is the latest in synthetic biology tools, models, and labs?
Use this context and output strict JSON only.

Paper titles: ["Beyond Language Modeling: An Exploration of Multimodal Pretraining", "Speculative Speculative Decoding", "Replaying pre-training data improves fine-tuning", "Helios: Real Real-Time Long Video Generation Model", "RealWonder: Real-Time Physical Action-Conditioned Video Generation", "Pretrained Vision-Language-Action Models are Surprisingly Resistant to Forgetting in Continual Learning", "Analysis of the Riemann Zeta Function via Recursive Taylor Expansions", "Solving an Open Problem in Theoretical Physics using AI-Assisted Discovery"]
Tweet snippets: []
Signal accounts: []

Return JSON with exactly this schema and nothing else:
{"keywords":["k1","k2","k3","k4"],"rationale":"one short sentence"}
Rules: keywords must be concise (2-6 words), specific, and relevant to likely new videos in last 24h.
keywords: What is the latest in synthetic biology tools, models, and labs?
